It is really simple to use thanks to the power of AI - you just describe your criteria in plain English, type it down as much details as you want, and it will formulate your filter criteria for you! My best ones were the prices at specific times of the day. Blessed to be a trader in this era 😉

One thing that I would add, indices and market direction. 
Make sure the indices or the market is trending or at least green and no economic news can adversely impact it pre-market.
If the indices are trending down, the tickers would not sustain is up move, it either consolidate or reverse, especially if they are big caps.
